title: begonia dichotoma
intro: Begonia dichotoma, also known as the iron cross begonia or iron cross, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. It is primarily grown for its unique, iron-like markings on its leaves and stems, and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves and stems of the Begonia dichotoma can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are said to provide health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
